reviews.review_description: What can i say, Its just a very good game with high quality textures, models, and horror

I can saw about 1 million things about how good this game is has awesome textures a better working computer then gorilla tags and the most scariest horror ever it also has a working wardrobe awesome music a shop with better cosmetics then gorilla tag everything about this game is better then gorilla tag in app purchases and game modes that are coming very soon like prop hunt tag and more so what are you waiting for get this game and have the most fun amazing day ever
I can yap about how Sigma this game is but I won’t I just say it has cool models, Textures, Horror and cosmetics, Get this game. Also Plz make a new video Revol VR
